slides.title: Papa Johns Pizza

slides.text: Music is the lifeblood of TikTok. From artists who go from bedroom stars to international pop stars, to users who dance, do makeup trends, and create memes based on Sounds and songs, it is the driving force of the platform.

As a content strategy lead in music editorial, it was my job to evangelize the success stories on the platform and also expose music happenings to users on and off-platform of what's happening in silos they may not be part of.
As a result, we developed @MusicOnTikTok, a standalone brand that evangelized the story of music on TikTok across new touchpoints.

To launch that, we contracted an agency and began developing content series and features that would serve as a conduit for storytelling, as well as a permanent placement we could use as a relationship-builder with music talent, labels and managers.

slides.title: Results
slides.text:
- 397,100 organic followers on TikTok
- 55,000 organic followers on Instagram
- Became a revenue-driving platform that led to brand and music festival partnerships
- TikTok's own music festival, and several brand content series

Sonic had a product so visually distinctive and culturally resonant it practically created its own
demand. The challenge was turning that latent desire into a moment — one that would drive
traffic, generate buzz, and make the limited-time offering feel like a true cultural event.
slides.title: Optional Title

slides.text:
We built an integrated campaign around the Unicorn Dream Slush that leaned into the product's
inherently shareable aesthetic, tapping into the cultural conversation around fantasy, escapism
and color.

The strategy connected platform-first social with influencer amplification and in-store activation — and the resulting story became the centerpiece of a broader case study: "The Making of a Myth: How SONIC's Unicorn Horn Straw Became a Cultural Artifact."

slides.title: Results
slides.text:
- 10% increase in same-store sales
- Sold out across the country
- Created a secondary resale market on eBay that also sold out
- PRWeek 2026 nominations: Best Consumer Launch and Best Content
- Shorty Awards 2026 nominations: Storytelling and Restaurants categories
- 2026 Innovation Sabre Awards wins: Best Digital Promo and Activation; Innovative Use of Emerging and Community-Driven Platforms
One of the remits of TikTok's music team was to make artists who were popping on the platform pop off-platform — showing the efficacy of being a presence on TikTok as an artist.

slides.title: The solution
slides.text: One way to do that is to get the artists paid. In 2021, we worked with Chevrolet to develop a creator-led campaign that paired star creator Tiagz with the Chevrolet Bolt EUV in Canada — a campaign that broke new ground for what a brand-creator partnership on the platform could look like.

slides.title: Results
slides.text:
- First music branded effect on the platform
- First auto brand to collaborate with a musician for a custom song
- First auto brand to use Interactive Add-On
- First auto brand contest on platform

paragraphs: {{jordan}} is a cultural strategist, currently working as a freelance Strategy Director and VP Brand Consultant in New York City.

For the past 15 years, he has worked at the intersection of advertising and culture — work that took shape at some of the most recognizable companies in the business: {{tiktok-company}}, {{wk}}, {{tbwa}}, {{anomaly}}, and {{vice-company}}.

Across these roles, he has developed integrated strategy and content for {{spotify}}, {{hilton}}, {{corona}}, {{budlight}}, {{mountaindew}}, {{papajohns}} and {{doritos}}, {{tiktok-music}}, {{sonic}}, {{chevrolet}} and many others.

Outside of brand consulting and strategy work, Jordan is the co-founder of {{boosiefade}}, a hip-hop party-turned-cultural platform comprising online communities, a music-criticism podcast, and a film-programming series in partnership with {{tiff-boosiefade}}. Jordan  also produces and hosts {{majorfixnyc}}, a PowerPoint lecture series about obsession.
His writing has appeared in {{ssense}}, {{fader}}, {{vice-writing}}, and {{complex}}, among others.
He’s also a frequent public speaker — hosting red carpets and moderating panels in film, music, and brand strategy at {{tiff-speaking}}, {{digologue}}, {{cmw}}, and others.
